hero.heading: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: How we collect, use, protect, and share your personal information.

intro: At Peptide Pure, your privacy is extremely important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, protect, and share your personal information when you visit our website, make a purchase, or interact with us in any way.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.text: We may collect the following types of information:
items: Personal Information: Name, email address, shipping and billing addresses, phone number, and payment details.
Account Information: If you create an account, we store login credentials and order history.
Device & Usage Data: IP address, browser type, device info, and browsing behavior.
Cookies: To enhance user experience and analyze website performance.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
items: Improve our website and user experience
Send order updates, marketing emails, and special offers (you can opt out anytime)

sections.title: 3. How We Share Your Information
sections.text: We never sell your personal data. However, we may share information with:
items: Trusted third-party partners (e.g., payment processors, shipping services)

sections.title: 4. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.text: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
items: Track website performance and user behavior
sections.extra: You can control cookie settings through your browser at any time.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.text: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
sections.text: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
items: Access or update your personal information
sections.extra: To exercise your rights, please contact us via our contact page.

sections.title: 7. Third-Party Links
sections.text: Our site may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices and encourage you to review their policies before sharing personal data.

sections.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
